nasb.text: The Jews then said, “It took forty-six years to build this temple, and will You raise it up in three days?”

esv.text: The Jews then said, “It has taken forty-six years to build this temple, and will you raise it up in three days?”

cnv.text: 猶太人說：“這殿建了四十六年，你三天之內就能把它建造起來嗎？”

ccb.text: 他们说：“这座殿用了四十六年才建成，你三天之内就要把它重建起来吗？”

csbs.text: 那些犹太人说：“这圣所建了四十六年，而你能在三天内把它建起来吗？”
